title: Beachfront Bliss
description: Experience luxurious beachfront living in our stunning A-frame property. With 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and breathtaking views, this entire place accommodates up to 6 guests. Embrace relaxation and adventure by the beach!
indoor: Bright and inviting coastal living space.
outdoor: Stunning ocean view from beautiful balcony.
amenities: Enjoy air conditioning, heating, and a complete kitchen. Entertainment features include a ping pong table, record player, and sound system. Family-friendly with a children's playroom, crib, and outdoor playground. Safety amenities include smoke alarms and a first aid kit.
nearbyPlaces: Delight in diverse dining options, thrilling mini-golf, and famed attractions like Myrtle Beach SkyWheel, all just a short drive away. Enjoy convenient shopping and local cafes, with immediate beach access for swimming and sunbathing.
